page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web-based pathway analysis platform ,which provides full access to the set of pathways that can be imported into a chassis organism such as E. coli through the application of an Extended Metabolic Space modeling framework.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web-based pathway analysis platform ,which provides full access to the set of pathways that can be imported into a chassis organism such as E. coli through the application of an Extended Metabolic Space modeling framework.
